name: elderly-event-management
description: Phase 1 — Elderly Event Management (Express + MongoDB backend, React + Vite + MUI frontend)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm --dir backend dev" "pnpm --dir frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir backend build && pnpm --dir frontend build
scripts.install:all: pnpm --dir backend install && pnpm --dir frontend install
